description: Complete the partially-drawn Emergency Severity Index (ESI) v4 triage decision tree in ~/Diagrams/esi_triage_tree.drawio based on the specification provided in ~/Desktop/esi_v4_algorithm.txt. The completed diagram must include Decision Points C and D, all five ESI terminal nodes (Levels 1-5), and appropriate branching logic with labels. Apply specific color-coding to the terminal nodes: Level 1 (Red), Level 2 (Orange), Level 3 (Yellow), Level 4 (Green), and Level 5 (Blue). Include a legend mapping the ESI levels to their colors and acuity descriptions. Save the file and export the final diagram as ~/Diagrams/exports/esi_triage_tree.png and ~/Diagrams/exports/esi_triage_tree.svg.
